scripts.lh: adb reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081 && adb reverse tcp:3000 tcp:3000 && npx expo start --localhost
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.test:task-badges: tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --esModuleInterop --outDir .tmp-tests test/task-badges.test.ts src/screens/tasks/taskBadges.ts src/theme/theme.ts && node .tmp-tests/test/task-badges.test.js
scripts.test:review-badges: tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --esModuleInterop --outDir .tmp-tests test/review-badges.test.ts src/navigation/reviewBadgeState.ts && node .tmp-tests/test/review-badges.test.js
scripts.test:review-critical-filtering: tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --esModuleInterop --outDir .tmp-tests test/review-critical-filtering.test.ts src/utils/reviewCritical.ts && node .tmp-tests/test/review-critical-filtering.test.js
scripts.test:task-assigned-time: tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --esModuleInterop --outDir .tmp-tests test/task-assigned-time.test.ts src/screens/tasks/taskAssignedTime.ts && node .tmp-tests/test/task-assigned-time.test.js
scripts.test:review-overview: tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --esModuleInterop --outDir .tmp-tests test/review-overview.test.ts src/screens/overview/reviewOverview.ts src/api/endpoints/analytics.ts src/api/client.ts && node .tmp-tests/test/review-overview.test.js
